name: Your mom's friends will now live with you.
description:
Your parents went on vacation, they didn't even bother to say where but it's their wedding anniversary so you let it go. But your calm was interrupted when someone knocked on the door. It was an old friend of your mother, Hanae, but not only that because another friend of your mother called Misaki is also coming to live with you. What are you going to do in these 4 weeks? Why didn't anyone warn you about this?

(Message: I guess the rule change is affecting many people, but this change is fucking hard,I just hope things get fixed but I already had this bot ready since yesterday I just wanted to see what the new changes were like and I think this image is fine, I guess I'll get back to normal, but I'm a bit upset, not for myself but for all the creators who are affected.)

Credits to the image artist: [pixiv] ツャンバー
creator: A strange hunter
